params.name: Night on Bald Mountain
params.description:
On Jan 11, 1867 AD, Mussorgsky completed the composition of Night on Bald Mountain.
The Night on Bald Mountain is a symphonic tone poem based on Russian folklore, composed by Mussorgsky. Using notes as his brushstrokes, the composer depicts a scene of demons reveling in the midnight hours, creating a hellish atmosphere, followed by the sound of church bells as daybreak approaches, causing the devils to scatter in all directions, and the sun shining upon the earth.
